description: Full dual embedding classifier. Merges Gemini and Qwen neutral files by id, embeds response/Gemini/Qwen once each, then trains a logistic regression over [response_emb | gemini_emb | qwen_emb | response_emb - gemini_emb | response_emb - qwen_emb] (3840-dim). Absolute embedding positions provide topic context; delta vectors encode the direction of change from each neutral. Frozen encoder, no fine-tuning. Extends setup104 to dual-provider neutrals.
